code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut p = 0
  mut n = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < toks.len()
    match toks.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(v)
        if v > 0
          p = p + v
        else if v < 0
          n = n + v
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  let r = p - n
  println("r=#{r}")
when None
  println("r=0")
end
